name: G-4 migrate-rubric: namespace routing joins the remaining tokens with '-' so google-eng-practices lands under google/eng-practices.yaml
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-eng-001
    provenance:
      - source: google-eng-practices
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -f out/google/eng-practices.yaml ] && echo joined 1>&2
